title: Clear column unless value is ______
excerpt:
I am trying to create an automation or workflow that would allow the board data in particular dropdown columns to all be cleared unless the dropdown contained a particular value. 
For example clear column Wednesday 13th …

posts.author: rbanasattherrp (Rhyan Banas)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to create an automation or workflow that would allow the board data in particular dropdown columns to all be cleared unless the dropdown contained a particular value.
For example clear column Wednesday 13th unless the drawdown contains the value “OFF”.

Right now I can clear the column but it clears all the data including the “OFF” value, which would be helpful to leave.
